biz.lede: We're industry-agnostic. If your business ships digital work — or is stuck because it can't — an operator can stand up the right agents for you in under a week.
biz.b1.p: Brief → wireframe → copy → code → deploy. Shipped under an hour.
biz.b2.p: Menu, waitlist, FAQ, payment-capture bots for any business.
biz.b3.p: Static + video ad sets, variants, tested and re-cut in batches.
biz.b4.p: Logo, palette, product shots, social kits — brand-consistent.
biz.b5.p: Deep-dive with sources cited, live review round included.
biz.b6.p: Activation flows, lifecycle emails, in-app tours — done.
biz.b8.p: Invoice generation, reconciliation, reporting on a schedule.
biz.b9.p: NDAs, terms, privacy — reviewed by a real lawyer on-platform.
biz.b10.p: Jingles, demos, soundtracks — delivered in minutes.
biz.b11.p: Step-by-step teaching with an operator keeping it honest.
biz.b12.p: Journaling, thinking partner, gentle reality checks. Your boundaries.
biz.callout_p: Something we haven't listed? Describe it in chat — we'll wire a pilot for your workflow within 72 hours.
